name: Sidra Villas
researcher_notes: Sidra Villas comprises three completed phases (I, II, III) within Dubai Hills Estate, Mohammed Bin Rashid City. Phase I has 170 villas, Phase II has 160 villas, Phase III has 145 villas — totalling approximately 475 villas across the three phases (some sources round to ~1,000 for the broader Sidra community; the 475 figure from Property Finder blog refers specifically to Sidra I).
All three phases are ready and handed over. Sidra I was launched July 2017 with handovers beginning December 2019 per Bayut.
Freehold ownership confirmed via Bayut area guide.

Current resale prices (May 2026) range from approximately AED 7.6M to AED 23M based on Bayut and PropertyFinder listing data. DLD transaction data from PropertyFinder shows recent Sidra II sales: 3BR ~AED 8.2M–10.25M, 4BR ~AED 10.3M–11.7M, 5BR ~AED 14.2M–16M.

Rental indicative figures from PropertyFinder blog (published Nov 2024, may not reflect current market): 3BR from AED 145,000/yr, 4BR from AED 150,000/yr, 5BR from AED 175,000/yr. These should be verified against live listings.
ROI figures cited by 1newhomes.ae (2.5–4.5% rental yield, 5–10% annual price growth) are sourced from a PwC reference on that site but are not independently verified here; treat as indicative only.
Source 3 (harperwellington.com/sidra-village) refers to a different community — Sidra Village in Umm Suqeim 2 by Wasl Properties — and has been excluded from this knowledge base to avoid confusion.
Nearest metro station is InsuranceMarket Metro Station (Red Line) at approximately 15-minute drive per Bayut. Nearest bus stops are Dubai Hills Mulberry and Dubai Hills Mall bus stops.

Schools referenced in sources include GEMS International School (GIS) Al Khail (IB curriculum, ages 3–18) and Blossom Nursery branches within Dubai Hills Estate. Specific school ratings/fees not confirmed from sources.
Healthcare: American Hospital Dubai Hills Clinic (in Dubai Hills Mall), Mediclinic Dubai Hills, King's College Hospital Dubai (~10-min drive), Mediclinic Parkview Hospital referenced in Bayut source.
Dubai Hills Mall (opened 2022, ~650 retail outlets) is the primary retail destination within the master community.
The 18-hole Dubai Hills Golf Club is a key community anchor referenced across all sources.
45 km of nature trails and 14 tennis courts cited for Dubai Hills Estate master community (1newhomes.ae).
Golden Visa eligibility: properties above AED 2M qualify under UAE federal rules; all Sidra Villas units at current market prices exceed this threshold.

overview.name: Dubai Hills Estate
overview.description: Dubai Hills Estate is a large-scale master community located off Al Khail Road (E44) and Umm Suqeim Street (D63), southeast of Downtown Dubai, neighbouring Al Barsha South and Nad Al Sheba. It is built around an 18-hole championship golf course and includes villas, townhouses, and apartment sub-communities.

location_connectivity.public_transport_note: The community is primarily car-oriented. Public bus connections exist at Dubai Hills Mall and Mulberry stops. Metro access requires a drive to the nearest Red Line station.

developer_profile.name: Emaar Properties
developer_profile.track_record_note: Emaar is one of the UAE's largest and most established developers, known for large-scale master-planned communities and timely delivery. Sidra Villas I handovers commenced December 2019 following a July 2017 launch.

investment_overrides.location_within_community: Western side of Dubai Hills Estate, next to Central Park
investment_overrides.notes: Sidra I is located adjacent to Central Park and is approximately 7 minutes from Dubai Hills Golf Club per Bayut

sales_talking_points.headline: First phase of Sidra Villas — established, mature community next to Central Park
key_features: Private gardens, covered parking, maid's room
~7-minute drive to Dubai Hills Golf Club

investment_overrides.notes: Set close to Umm Suqeim Street (D63); private garden and pool are highlights; Golf Place sub-community to the north, Maple at Dubai Hills to the east

sales_talking_points.headline: 160 contemporary villas with private pools and gardens in the heart of Dubai Hills Estate
key_features: Private garden and pool per villa
Two-storey design with master en-suite and maid's room
Close to Umm Suqeim Street for easy Al Khail Road access
DLD-verified transactions from AED 8.17M (3BR) to AED 16M (5BR) in early 2026

investment_overrides.notes: Sidra III is the smallest phase by unit count. Starting price from propjunction.ae may be outdated; current market prices likely higher based on broader Sidra Villas transaction data.

sales_talking_points.headline: The final and most intimate phase of Sidra Villas — 145 villas with full community access
key_features: 145 detached villas — smallest and most exclusive phase
Access to all Dubai Hills Estate master community amenities
Multi-purpose hall and fitness club within the development

development_level.headline_stats: ~475 detached villas across 3 completed phases within Dubai Hills Estate; all phases ready and handed over; freehold ownership; current resale prices AED 7.6M–23M (May 2026).
development_level.scarcity_argument: Sidra Villas is a completed, low-density freehold villa community with no new supply being added. With only ~475 homes across three phases and strong demand from families seeking golf-course-adjacent living in a master-planned community, resale inventory is limited and competition among buyers is high.
development_level.lifestyle_pitch: Sidra Villas offers a rare combination of contemporary villa living, green open spaces, and world-class amenities within Dubai Hills Estate. Residents enjoy direct access to an 18-hole championship golf course, 45 km of nature trails, cycling tracks, swimming pools, and Dubai Hills Mall — all within a gated, family-friendly community that is central to Dubai's key destinations.
development_level.investment_pitch: Freehold ownership, Golden Visa eligibility (all units exceed AED 2M), and Emaar's track record as Dubai's most trusted developer underpin long-term capital value. DLD transaction data shows active resale market with 3BR villas transacting from AED 8.17M–10.25M and 5BR villas reaching AED 16M in early 2026. The community's established status and scarcity of comparable product support continued price appreciation.
development_level.objection_handling: Buyers concerned about price levels should note that Sidra Villas offers freehold title, Emaar quality, and a fully operational community with schools, healthcare, retail, and leisure within the master development — factors that justify the premium over less-established villa communities. For those comparing to newer off-plan product, Sidra Villas eliminates construction and delivery risk entirely.

sidra_villas_i.pitch: The original and most established phase, Sidra I sits adjacent to Central Park and offers the most mature community feel. Ideal for buyers who want an established neighbourhood with proven capital growth since 2019 handover.
sidra_villas_i.key_differentiator: Next to Central Park; 170 villas; launched 2017, handed over 2019 — longest track record of the three phases.

sidra_villas_ii.pitch: Sidra II offers private pools and gardens as standard, with strong DLD-verified transaction activity in 2026. Well-positioned near Umm Suqeim Street for easy access to Al Khail Road.
sidra_villas_ii.key_differentiator: Private pool per villa; 160 units; active resale market with transparent DLD pricing data available.

sidra_villas_iii.pitch: The smallest and most intimate phase with only 145 villas, Sidra III offers the greatest scarcity within the Sidra Villas collection. Full access to all Dubai Hills Estate amenities.
sidra_villas_iii.key_differentiator: Fewest units of the three phases — highest scarcity value within Sidra Villas.

location.area: Dubai Hills Estate, Mohammed Bin Rashid City, Dubai
location.description: Sidra Villas is located within Dubai Hills Estate, off Al Khail Road (E44) and Umm Suqeim Street (D63), southeast of Downtown Dubai. The community neighbours Al Barsha South and Nad Al Sheba and is built around an 18-hole championship golf course.

investment.branded_premium_note: Emaar-developed community within a master-planned estate anchored by an 18-hole golf course. All three phases are completed and operational. DLD transaction data available for price transparency.

sales_talking_points.freehold_title: Full freehold ownership available to all nationalities
sales_talking_points.golden_visa: All current market prices exceed AED 2M threshold — buyers qualify for UAE 10-year Golden Visa
sales_talking_points.emaar_quality: Built by Emaar Properties, UAE's most recognised developer, with handovers completed from 2019
sales_talking_points.community_maturity: Fully operational community with schools, healthcare, retail, and leisure in place — no waiting for infrastructure
sales_talking_points.golf_lifestyle: One of the few villa communities in Dubai with direct access to an 18-hole championship golf course
sales_talking_points.green_living: 45 km of nature trails, cycling tracks, and extensive parklands within the master community
sales_talking_points.connectivity: Direct access to Al Khail Road (E44) providing efficient links to Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, and both airports
sales_talking_points.scarcity: Fixed supply of ~475 completed villas across three phases with no new Sidra Villas supply planned
sales_talking_points.transaction_transparency: Active DLD-registered resale market with publicly available transaction data

prompt_data.developer_track_record: Emaar Properties is one of the UAE's largest publicly listed developers (DFM: EMAAR), responsible for landmark projects including Burj Khalifa, The Dubai Mall, Downtown Dubai, and Arabian Ranches. Sidra Villas I was launched in July 2017 and handovers commenced December 2019, demonstrating on-schedule delivery.

audit_flags: Rental yield and price growth percentages (2.5–4.5% and 5–10%) sourced from 1newhomes.ae citing PwC; not independently verified — treat as indicative only
Rental price figures (AED 145K–175K/yr) from PropertyFinder blog dated November 2024 — may not reflect current 2026 market rates; live listing verification recommended
DLD transaction data extracted only for Sidra Villas II; Sidra I and III transaction-level data not available from provided sources
Exact drive times to Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, and airports not confirmed from sources — directional estimates only
School fee structures, KHDA ratings, and detailed school information not available from provided sources
Service charge / RERA-registered maintenance fee data not available from provided sources

Sidra Villas I unit count discrepancy: PropertyFinder blog states 475 villas for Sidra I specifically; opr.ae and 1newhomes.ae state 170/160/145 per phase totalling 475 across all three phases — the 475-total-across-three-phases figure is used as primary
Starting price for Sidra III from propjunction.ae (AED 5,036,888) appears inconsistent with current market transaction data and may be outdated — flagged for verification
No confirmed service charge rates or DLD fee waiver details verified from primary sources
Sidra Village (Umm Suqeim 2, Wasl Properties) is a distinct community and has been excluded; any query conflating the two should be clarified with the buyer
